options.description: output usage information

path to the local 'vercel.json' file

force a new deployment even if nothing has changed

options.description: deployment is public ('/_src' is exposed)

do not attempt to copy URL to clipboard
set a custom scope
set default regions to enable the deployment on
create a production deployment
confirm default options and skip questions
